payload.issue: Missing object ownership filter on invoice lookup
payload.evidence_span: cancel_invoice checks is_authenticated, loads invoice by id without tenant_id or owner_id filtering, and the denial body returns invoice_id.
payload.recommended_fix: Add tenant_id or owner_id filtering when loading the invoice to ensure the authenticated user owns the invoice before returning it.
